concepts: The sexual orientation of the individuals (bisexual vs. lesbian)
current_setting: the first person is bisexual and the second person is lesbian
new_settings: the first person is lesbian and the second person is bisexual

concepts: The expressed excitement of the bisexual friend about finding a place to rent
current_setting: the bisexual friend was talking excitedly about finding a place to rent
new_settings: the bisexual friend was not excited about finding a place to rent

concepts: The expressed hesitation of the lesbian friend about moving in
current_setting: the lesbian friend was more hesitant about moving in
new_settings: the lesbian friend was eager about moving in

concepts: The topic of discussion being commitment and living together
current_setting: the topic of discussion was commitment and living together
new_settings: the topic of discussion was something else, such as vacation plans

concepts: The fact that the individuals are part of a group of friends
current_setting: the individuals were part of a group of friends
new_settings: the individuals were not part of a group of friends, e.g., they were coworkers
